items.title: Where Honeywell Intl Stands With Analysts
Is 3M Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
items.description: While 3M has underperformed the SPX over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook on the stock’s prospects.

items.title: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Honeywell Intl, Raises Price Target to $275
items.description: Barclays  analyst Julian Mitchell   maintains Honeywell Intl (NASDAQ:HON) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $259 to $275.

items.title: The Bull Case For Honeywell International (HON) Could Change Following Aerospace Spin-Off Plans And HONA Filing
items.description: Honeywell recently filed a Form 10 registration statement with the SEC for the planned spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace, which aims to become an independent public company called HONA on Nasdaq in the third quarter of 2026, focused on electrification, autonomy and safety across commercial air transport, business aviation and defense markets. The company has also scheduled an Investor Day for June 3, 2026, where management plans to outline how separating the Aerospace business could reshape...

items.title: Process Automation & Instrumentation Strategic Industry Report 2026-2030: Focus on Oil & Gas, Food & Beverages, Pharmaceuticals, Chemicals, Pulp & Paper, Water & Wastewater Treatment
items.author: Researchandmarkets.Com
items.description: The global Process Automation & Instrumentation market is projected to grow from $78 billion in 2024 to $113.1 billion by 2030 at a 6.4% CAGR. Growth is driven by digital transformation, IIoT adoption, regulatory compliance demands, and the need for operational efficiency across oil & gas, pharmaceuticals, chemicals, and other industries. Advanced technologies like digital twins, AI, and wireless instrumentation are reshaping the sector.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed among major competitors in expanding market; well-positioned to capitalize on rising demand for smart instrumentation, IIoT solutions, and predictive maintenance technologies.
Featured as major competitor; well-positioned to benefit from growing demand for automation solutions, regulatory compliance monitoring, and smart instrumentation technologies.
Listed among key players in expanding market; positioned to benefit from increased adoption of process automation and digital transformation across manufacturing and industrial sectors.
Key competitor in the market; positioned to benefit from growing demand for energy-efficient automation solutions and industrial IoT implementations.

Featured as a key player in the growing process automation market with strong market presence; positioned to benefit from 6.4% CAGR growth and increasing adoption of automation solutions across industries.
